error_signature: Model output doesn’t fit required format
title: Model output format error in Structured Output Parser Node
symptom: The Structured Output Parser Node throws an error stating 'Model output doesn’t fit required format' when processing the output from the LLM Basic Chain.
applies_when: Output from LLM Basic Chain is not in expected format
not_this_if: Output is correctly formatted according to the parser's requirements
root_cause: The output from the LLM Basic Chain does not match the expected structure that the Structured Output Parser Node can process. This can occur if the output is not properly formatted as JSON or if it contains unexpected data types.
fix_steps: Change the 'On Error' parameter in the root node’s settings to allow execution to continue despite the error.
Consider using an AI Agent node with a refined prompt for output parsing.
Optionally, use the deprecated Auto Fixing Output parser to handle parsing issues.
agent_instruction: Adjust the 'On Error' settings in the root node and consider using an AI Agent for better output parsing.
